text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Osaka Hai. Super Creek is
bursting with energy from doing her best for me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross drops by to cheer her on by saying
she's looking forward to their contest at the
spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek heads to the track to make Tamamo
Cross proud.
